title: ResiliencyGap
description: A resiliency gap. Most are LLM-proposed (Tier B) then re-grounded with the shared signature library (HYBRID-PLAN §7.9): refutation-probe gaps are sourceTier=llm/needs-review; a confirmation-probe gap the engine re-derived at the pointer graduates to sourceTier=ast and may verify (§9.4). Parameter-completeness gaps (rederivation=param-completeness, Round-3 R5) are engine-only Tier-A: a resilience pattern is declared but a load-bearing param is unconfigured (e.g. a @CircuitBreaker with no failure-rate-threshold) — no LLM involved.

proposedCategory.description: For category=novel: the LLM-proposed out-of-taxonomy category name (open-discovery channel), pending graduation into the taxonomy.

checked.description: Paths the engine searched for a refuting signature before asserting the absence (honest negative).
